case_title: BERRIOS, REYNALDO VS TOLPEN, FARLEY S. (ATTY. AT LAW)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BERRIOS, REYNALDO AS TO DEFENDANT TOLPEN, FARLEY S. (ATTY. AT LAW) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOLPEN, FARLEY S. (ATTY. AT LAW)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOLPEN, FARLEY S. (ATTY. AT LAW) THE DISMISSAL IS BASED ON DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATION TO THE COURT AND PLAINTIFF THAT THE UNDERLYING CLAIM OF SETON MEDICAL CENTER HAS BEEN SATISFIED, AND CREDIT REPORTING AGENCIES HAVE BEEN NOTIFIED ACCORDINGLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REYNALDO BERRIOS' CORRESPONDENCE TO COMMISSIONER SLAVIT FILED.
